# Owner

**Department:** Leadership
**Reports to:** Self
**Last updated:** 2026-06-10

The goal of this role is to keep orders flowing from intake to ship.

This person is a player-coach.

## Objectives + Metrics

- **Ship fast** — orders out same day · Metric: order-to-ship hours

## Role Responsibilities

### Core Loop

#### Daily

- [ ] **Review** — open orders using [shopify](../tools/shopify.md)

### Triggered Tasks

- [ ] **Expedite** — when an order is flagged rush → ship same day

### Infinite Tasks

- [ ] **Tend** — supplier relationships

## KOODAR Breakdown

### K — Know
- Catalog and pricing.

### O — Observe
- Open order queue.

### O — Orient
- Seasonal demand baseline.

### D — Decide
- When to expedite.

### A — Act
- Standard fulfillment SOP.

### R — Review (weekly)
- Late-shipment rate.
